title: Sh@ma`ah #8094
definition:
Shemaah = "the rumour"

 1) a Benjamite, the Gibeathite, father of Ahiezer and Joash, both
    mighty warriors of David who joined him at Ziklag
nasbUsage:

    mighty warriors of David who joined him at Ziklag
